name: Lovelight Chiffon Yellow Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Lightly oil and dust two round 8- or 9-inch layer pans with flour.
3. Beat Egg whites until frothy.
4. Gradually beat in 1/2 cup Sugar, continuing to beat until very stiff and glossy.
5. Sift remaining Sugar, Flour, Baking powder, and Salt into a separate bowl.
6. Add Wesson Oil, half the Milk, and Vanilla to the flour mixture. Beat on medium speed for 1 minute, or whisk for 150 strokes by hand.
7. Scrape sides and bottom of the bowl constantly.
8. Add remaining Milk and Egg yolks, then beat for 1 more minute, scraping the bowl constantly.
9. Gently fold in the Meringue.
10. Pour batter into prepared pans.
11. Bake layers for 30-35 minutes.
12. Cool, then frost with Seven-minute Frosting or your choice of frosting.
